prompt: I want to submit a long-running Modal job from my web server and let it run detached — the user should get a job ID they can poll later
assertions: The code uses .spawn() to submit the job asynchronously
The code captures and returns a job ID or FunctionCall handle to the caller
The code demonstrates how to poll or retrieve the result using the job ID (e.g., fc.get() or polling fc.get(timeout=0))
The code deploys the function with modal deploy or uses Function.from_name() so the web server can reference a stable remote function
The code does not block the web server request handler waiting for completion
The response explains the difference between .spawn() and .map() in this context
